creator: nakai@TokyoNet.AD.JP
text:
junker> Currently devel/gettext ports(gettext-0.10) is too old.
junker> gettext-0.10.35 is a most recent version, and it is more stable than
junker> 0.10.
junker> 
junker> I am not a port maintainer of this. I mailed it to the maintainer,
junker> but I got returned mail. So I send this report to ports team directly.
junker> (and Cc: to him once more)

Sorry, Our mail server for the Nakai@technologist.com address is temporarily
down.

Please accept Mr. junker's patch for 2.2.8 Release.

--------------
Yukihiro Nakai
